PostToolUse.description: Run type checker after file edits (TypeScript projects)
PostToolUse.command: if [ -f tsconfig.json ]; then npx tsc --noEmit --pretty 2>&1 | tail -20; fi

PostToolUse.description: Run linter after file edits (projects with ESLint)
PostToolUse.command: if [ -f .eslintrc* ] || [ -f eslint.config.* ]; then npx eslint --max-warnings=0 $(git diff --name-only --diff-filter=M | grep -E '\.(ts|tsx|js|jsx)$' | head -5) 2>&1 | tail -20; fi

PostToolUse.description: Run ruff after file edits (Python projects)
PostToolUse.command: if [ -f pyproject.toml ] && grep -q ruff pyproject.toml 2>/dev/null; then ruff check $(git diff --name-only --diff-filter=M | grep -E '\.py$' | head -5) 2>&1 | tail -20; fi
